creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=dcff1491b3450da64f87afc9750734a87af1652a

commit dcff1491b3450da64f87afc9750734a87af1652a
Author:     Michiel van Baak Jansen <michiel@vanbaak.eu>
AuthorDate: 2024-05-16 15:47:25 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-05-17 06:46:34 +0000

    net-p2p/prowlarr: Update to 1.17.2.4511

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/Prowlarr/Prowlarr/releases/tag/v1.17.2.4511

     * Multiple Translations updated by Weblate
     * Refactor PasswordInput to use type password
     * Fixed: Text color for inputs on login page
     * New: Dark theme for login screen
     * Fix class name for AppIndexerMapRepository
     * Automated API Docs update
     * New: Option to select download client when multiple of the same type are
       configured
     * New: Config file setting to disable log database (#2123)
     * Fixed: Allow decimals for Seed Ratio
     * Fixed: Don't share settings for same cached definition in
       CardigannRequestGenerator

    PR:             279032
    Reported by:    michiel@vanbaak.eu (maintainer)

 net-p2p/prowlarr/Makefile  |  2 +-
 net-p2p/prowlarr/distinfo  |  6 +++---
 net-p2p/prowlarr/pkg-plist | 20 +++++++++-----------
 3 files changed, 13 insertions(+), 15 deletions(-)
